Thanks for contributing to Scope! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md if you haven't yet.
Keep pull requests focused: one logical change per PR is easier to review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #45 -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Other:

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran and what you observed. Note which OS(es) you tested on. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --locked` passes
- [ ] `cargo build --locked --release` passes
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] I updated the documentation (README / this guide / plugin guide) if behavior changed
- [ ] I did **not** bump the version in `Cargo.toml` (releases are automated by the maintainer)
